game.name: Stardew Mod Manager
game.desc: Make sure you have the Stardew Valley port installed, and haven'treplaced any assets, as this tool will make a backup of the vanilla game, and make a mods folder. After the tool finishes making the backup, you can start adding mods to the mods folder. I have only tested it with sprite swaps (XNB files), and I don't think it will work with more complicated mods, so no custom menus with more options.
